translations.zh: 一位和藹可親的老婦人。

translations.en: "Welcome to my place of healing, Avatar."
"I hope thou needest not my services!"
"I hope this visit is for pleasure, not business!"
translations.zh: 「吾希望這次來訪是為了閒聊，而非看病！」

translations.en: "But gladly can I say that none of your party is dead!"
translations.zh: 「但吾很高興地說汝的隊伍無人陣亡！」

translations.en: "I've cared for the @unfit here for threescore years!"
translations.zh: 「吾在這裡照料@unfit（體弱）者已有六十年了！」
「那些需要@healing（療傷）、@curing（解毒），或需要被@resurrected（復活）的人。」

translations.en: "'Cah,' that is the word of sacrifice."
"Wilt thou make an offering of 30 gold?"
Tara approaches $Y and binds the wounds.
translations.zh: 塔拉走近 $Y，為其包紮傷口。

translations.en: "If thou wilt not pay, I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝不願付費，吾便無法為汝治療。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「抱歉。沒有獻金，吾無法為汝治療。」

translations.en: "Thou art poor, but thy cause is just."
translations.zh: 「汝雖貧窮，但汝的事業是正義的。」

translations.en: Sasha approaches $Y and binds the wounds.
translations.zh: 莎莎走近 $Y，為其包紮傷口。

translations.en: "Is there aught else I can do for thee?"
translations.zh: 「吾還有其他能為汝效勞的嗎？」

translations.en: "Wilt thou make an offering of 10 gold?"
Tara grabs a vial and pours it down $Y's throat.
translations.zh: 塔拉拿起一個小瓶，將藥液灌入 $Y 的喉嚨。

translations.en: "If thou wilt not pay, I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝不願付費，吾便無法為汝治療。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「抱歉。沒有獻金，吾無法為汝治療。」

translations.en: "Thou art poor, but thy cause is just."
translations.zh: 「汝雖貧窮，但汝的事業是正義的。」

translations.en: Tara grabs a vial and pours it down $Y's throat.
translations.zh: 塔拉拿起一個小瓶，將藥液灌入 $Y 的喉嚨。

translations.en: "Oh! I see that $Y carries a fallen comrade!"
translations.zh: 「哦！吾看到 $Y 攜帶著一位倒下的同伴！」

translations.en: "Wilt thou make an offering of 400 gold?"
"Then there is naught I can do save grieve with thee."
translations.zh: 「那吾只能與汝同哀，別無他法。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection for their fallen comrade.
translations.zh: 汝的隊伍為倒下的同伴湊錢。

translations.en: Tara lays hands upon the corpse...
translations.zh: 塔拉將雙手按在屍體上……

translations.en: "I see that $Y carries another slain friend."
translations.zh: 「吾看到 $Y 又攜帶著另一位陣亡的友人。」

translator_notes: 塔拉是米諾克的仁慈老治療師，行醫六十年。知道奉獻咒語「cah」。提供治療（30金）、解毒（10金）、復活（400金）服務。對貧窮的聖者可免費施術。復活咒語 Doman/thixus/anretu 保留原文。
